name: cc-toolkit
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace — root dev tooling (promptfoo eval suites live in plugins/<name>/evals/)

scripts.eval:fd:config: bash plugins/fd/evals/reset-sandbox.sh && promptfoo eval -c plugins/fd/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml --no-cache --no-share --filter-pattern CONFIG -o /tmp/eval-fd-config.json
